detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ETKSToken.migrate() (ETKSToken.sol#385-413):
	External calls:
	- ! newContract.migrate(msg.sender,tokens) (ETKSToken.sol#407)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Migrate(msg.sender,tokens) (ETKSToken.sol#411)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [ETKSToken.migrate()](ETKSToken.sol#L385-L413):
	External calls:
	- [! newContract.migrate(msg.sender,tokens)](ETKSToken.sol#L407)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [Migrate(msg.sender,tokens)](ETKSToken.sol#L411)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.12 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder
	- ZeroFunctionSelector
	- DelegateCallReturnValue
	- ECRecoverMalformedInput.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.12 (ETKSToken.sol#1)
detectors.markdown:
Version constraint ^0.4.12 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder
	- ZeroFunctionSelector
	- DelegateCallReturnValue
	- ECRecoverMalformedInput.
It is used by:
	- [^0.4.12](ETKSToken.sol#L1)
